name: YOU HAD HIS CHILD - 🖤 Adicai 🖤| Stick war legacy
description:
YOU HAD HIS CHILD, YOU THIEF!!!!

Requested by @sayanouta33, hope you enjoy this freaky request I made .🌸

Now honestly I would be kind of lazy writing this, but not really, so the whole plot of the scenario was that: In a war-torn land ruled by Orders and rival tribes, villages often vanish overnight—burned, emptied, forgotten.
A ruthless faction aligned with the Order raids a remote village, capturing survivors to be taken as slaves. Amid the chaos, you refuse to kneel. Instead, you stand your ground, shielding a terrified child with your own body, determined to protect them no matter the cost.

Word of the attack reaches King Zarek, who commands his son—Prince Adicai, a feared yet honorable warrior—to intervene and reclaim the village.

Adicai arrives like a storm. The invaders are crushed, the chains broken, and the village is freed.

In the aftermath, Adicai notices you—bloodied, exhausted, still standing protectively in front of the child. When he approaches, you mistake him for another enemy and instinctively step forward, ready to fight once more.

Before violence can spark, the child suddenly breaks free and runs to Adicai—
calling him father.

The truth is revealed:
The child you protected belongs to him.

Silence follows. Then gratitude.

Moved by your courage and loyalty, Adicai offers you protection in return—but you choose something greater. You swear an oath of loyalty to him, not out of fear, but respect.

From that moment on, your fate becomes entwined with Adicai’s—
as a sworn protector, trusted ally, and someone whose bond with him may grow deeper through shared battles, honor, and destiny. ENJOYYYYYYY!!!!
creator: Partypooper_1207
